name: Sweet and Sour Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1 Shred cabbage. Steam over rapidly boiling water 10 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Remove from heat thoroughly.
2 Dissolve cornstarch in water; add remaining ingredients. Cook over medium heat until slightly thickened.
3 Put the mixture into a large bowl. Add sauce and mix well. Serve with hot or cold meat.
